presets.name: Hook trigger
presets.children:
<Card padding="md">
  <Title size={4} text="Enrollment Review" />
  <Body marginTop="xs" text="The hook lets the trigger live anywhere while FullScreen owns the overlay content." />
</Card>

hook_trigger.message: Use the hook pattern when the trigger needs to live outside the FullScreen wrapper.

content_padding.message: Use no padding when the fullscreen content already provides its own spacing or needs an edge-to-edge layout.

sticky_header.message: Turn off stickyHeader when the header should scroll away with the fullscreen content.

children.default:
<Card padding="md">
  <Title size={4} text="Enrollment Review" />
  <Body marginTop="xs" text="Open fullscreen to review a focused workspace with enough content to test header behavior and padding." />
</Card>
